updates.title: Sovereign gold bond redemption tax rules: Do you need to declare it while filing ITR?
updates.summary: Sovereign gold bonds offer exposure to gold without storing physical bullion, issued by RBI. Investors must be aware of the tax implications, as capital gains exemption applies only for original subscribers holding until maturity. Details here.
updates.user_impact: May affect your tax liability or filing process
updates.content_angle: Educational explainer on this taxation development

updates.title: ITR filing 2026: Only earning rental income? Check if you still have to file tax return
updates.summary: Rental income can be the sole earnings for taxpayers, especially retirees or property owners. Even without regular employment income, filing an income tax return is necessary. Tax obligations depend on various factors, including rental income amount, deductions, and overall tax position.
updates.user_impact: May affect your tax liability or filing process
updates.content_angle: Educational explainer on this taxation development

updates.title: ITR filing: Confused between Form 16 Part A and Part B? Here's what they reveal about your salary and taxes
updates.summary: Form 16, divided into Part A and Part B, is essential for salaried employees to prove tax deductions from their salary. Part A details employer and employee information, while Part B gives a detailed salary breakdown.&nbsp;
updates.user_impact: May affect your tax liability or filing process
updates.content_angle: Educational explainer on this taxation development
